title: Numbers column set to currency should show currency #s in Gantt Chart
excerpt:
Description
We use a Gantt chart to display upcoming projects and label them by the $ amount of the project. But when you use the Label By function to show that $ column on that Gantt, it pulls the number in as a generic…

posts.author: kruse (Krista)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We use a Gantt chart to display upcoming projects and label them by the $ amount of the project. But when you use the Label By function to show that $ column on that Gantt, it pulls the number in as a generic number and it doesn’t retain the currency formatting.

What are you trying to achieve

We want to have our Gantt bars labeled by our Project $ column and show the number in the currency format.
